_comment: SAMPLE per-deployment connector flags. Copy to a real config and set states per what your district/school/classroom has connected. Unlisted connectors fall back to their registry default_flag (third-party = not_installed, so nothing is probed unless enabled). manual_paste + uploaded_file are always available. A connector can be ACTIVE yet district-restricted for specific evidence: use the object form {state, restricted_evidence, reason} (see google_workspace below) — the skill then drops that evidence to the next available source and lowers confidence. records_modules enables shared/records/ extended categories per deployment ([] = core only; "all" = every module). Schema: connector.schema.json.

google_workspace.reason: district policy: the AI may use Workspace calendar/files, but not read Gmail message bodies (student PII) — paste/upload the specific email instead
